title: China's Zhipu is closing in on top U.S. AI models with Anthropic and OpenAI held back
summary_full: Zhipu's GLM 5.2 shows the AI fight is shifting to who delivers the most intelligence per dollar, making open source suddenly a real contender.
summary_public: Zhipu's GLM 5.2 shows the AI fight is shifting to who delivers the most intelligence per dollar, making open source suddenly a real contender.
